title: Troubleshooting

book.title: NVIDIA NeMo Guardrails Library Developer Guide

description: Resolve common tracing issues with OpenTelemetry SDK configuration and connectivity.
content: Troubleshooting Issue Solution No traces appear Configure OpenTelemetry SDK in application code; verify tracing.enabled: true Connection errors Check collector is running; test with ConsoleSpanExporter first Import errors Install dependencies: pip install nemoguardrails[tracing] Wrong service name Set Resource with service.name in application code
summary: Configure OpenTelemetry SDK in application code; verify tracing.enabled: true
